---
title: "nestProvider()"
description: "Build a dependency-free provider binding shape for user-land Nest modules."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build a dependency-free provider binding shape for user-land Nest modules.

## Import

```ts
import { nestProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Signature

```ts
function nestProvider(
	provide: string | symbol,
	useValue: T,
): NestProviderBinding<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `provide` | `string \| symbol` | provide value used by the helper. |
| `useValue` | `T` | use value value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `NestProviderBinding<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { nestProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/nestjs.ts`
